org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.graphics

Class ShadowViewGraphics2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.graphics.ShadowViewGraphics2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorGraphics2D, ViewGraphics2D

    public class ShadowViewGraphics2D
extends Object
implements ViewGraphics2D
    Implementation of a graphics context which is delagating to another graphics context but by forcing the shadow drawing parameters.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ShadowViewGraphics2D(ViewGraphics2D context)
      Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with a color darker than the current background}.
      ShadowViewGraphics2D(ViewGraphics2D context, Color shadowColor)
      Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with the color specified by the parameter shadowColor.

      • ShadowViewGraphics2D

        Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with a color darker than the current background}.

      • ShadowViewGraphics2D

        public ShadowViewGraphics2D(ViewGraphics2D context,
                    Color shadowColor)
        Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with the color specified by the parameter shadowColor.
        Parameters:
        context -
        shadowColor - is the color to use to draw the shadow.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but with the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor,
                        Transform2D localTransformation)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.
        localTransformation - is the local transformation to apply to.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Shape2f viewShape,
                        Rectangle2f bounds,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Start a rendering context for a component.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        viewShape - is the shape of the component. It could be null to use the specified bounds.
        bounds - are the bounds of the component, never null.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.

      • pushRenderingContext

        public void pushRenderingContext(Figure component,
                        Color fillColor,
                        Color lineColor)
        Start a rendering context for a sub-component but this the specified local transformation.
        Specified by:
        pushRenderingContext in interface ViewGraphics2D
        Parameters:
        component - is the component to paint for.
        fillColor - is the color to use to fill the objects.
        lineColor - is the color to use to draw the outlines of the objects.
